golden_categories.name: Basic URL Validation
golden_categories.description: Covers general URL validation with standard protocols and formats.

golden_categories.name: Localhost and Non-TLD URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs without protocols or with localhost and non-TLD domains.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests related to handling protocols, including custom protocols and protocol validation.

golden_categories.name: Underscore Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URLs with underscores in the hostname.

golden_categories.name: TLD and Trailing Dot Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for URLs without TLDs and with trailing dots.

golden_categories.name: Protocol Relative URLs
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling protocol-relative URLs and related options.

golden_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling fragments and query components in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Authentication Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling authentication information in URLs.

golden_categories.name: Host Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating hostnames, including whitelists, blacklists, and regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Security and Vulnerability Handling
golden_categories.description: Tests for handling security-related cases, such as rejecting invalid protocols and parsing differences.

golden_categories.name: Length Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating URL length and configuring maximum allowed length.

generated_categories.name: Basic Input Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests basic validation of URLs, including null, empty, invalid characters, and special cases like 'mailto:' URLs.

generated_categories.name: URL Length Enforcement
generated_categories.description: Tests enforcement of maximum URL length, with and without the `validate_length` option.

generated_categories.name: Fragment and Query Component Handling
generated_categories.description: Tests handling of URL fragments and query components when specific options are enabled or disabled.

generated_categories.name: Authentication Component Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests validation and detection of authentication components in URLs, including malformed or malicious content.

generated_categories.name: Protocol and Port Validation
generated_categories.description: Tests validation of protocols and port numbers, including requirements for valid protocols and specific port ranges.

generated_categories.name: URL Parsing Logic
generated_categories.description: Tests specific parsing logic, such as identifying the first slash after the colon in a URL.

golden_to_generated.reason: GENC-1 overlaps with GC-1 in basic URL validation but includes additional cases like 'mailto:' URLs, which are not explicitly covered in GC-1.
GENC-1 partially matches GC-2 by addressing localhost and non-TLD URLs but lacks explicit coverage for protocol-less URLs.
GENC-5 partially matches GC-3 by addressing protocol validation but does not cover custom protocols comprehensively.
No generated category explicitly addresses underscore handling in hostnames.
No generated category explicitly addresses TLD and trailing dot handling.
GENC-5 partially matches GC-6 by addressing protocol-relative URLs but lacks explicit focus on related options.
GENC-3 strongly matches GC-7 by addressing fragments and query components comprehensively.
GENC-4 strongly matches GC-8 by addressing authentication handling comprehensively, including malformed and malicious content.
No generated category explicitly addresses host validation, including whitelists, blacklists, and regular expressions.
GENC-6 partially matches GC-10 by addressing specific parsing logic but lacks explicit focus on security-related cases.
GENC-2 strongly matches GC-11 by addressing URL length validation comprehensively, including maximum allowed length.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 overlaps with GC-1 and GC-2 in basic URL validation and localhost/non-TLD URLs but includes additional cases like 'mailto:' URLs.
GENC-2 strongly matches GC-11 by addressing URL length validation comprehensively.
GENC-3 strongly matches GC-7 by addressing fragments and query components comprehensively.
GENC-4 strongly matches GC-8 by addressing authentication handling comprehensively, including malformed and malicious content.
GENC-5 partially matches GC-3 and GC-6 by addressing protocol validation and protocol-relative URLs but lacks comprehensive coverage of custom protocols and related options.
GENC-6 partially matches GC-10 by addressing specific parsing logic but lacks explicit focus on security-related cases.
